touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Reese Kapoor at WestfieldEdge regarding CRM automation needs. Reese expressed frustration with current manual processes in customer success workflows and asked about automation capabilities. Rep confirmed fit and scheduled discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform handle automated follow-ups for student onboarding workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our unlimited automation tier supports multi-step workflows including conditional logic and email sequencing.

questions_asked.question: What's your current team size handling CS operations?
questions_asked.answer: We have about 7 people touching the CRM regularly across CS and sales.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week
Send overview deck on CRM automation features

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call time and sharing product overview deck. Reese responded promptly confirming availability and mentioned interest in seeing workflow templates specific to EdTech use cases.

questions_asked.question: Do you have any EdTech customer references we could review beforehand?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - I'll include two case studies in the deck showing how similar-sized EdTech companies automated their student lifecycle.

next_steps: Reese to review materials before call
Rep to prepare EdTech-specific demo scenarios

touches.ai_summary: 49-minute product demo focusing on CRM automation workflows. Reese demonstrated strong engagement and tested several workflow scenarios live. Showed enthusiasm about time savings but mentioned budget approval would need to go through finance. No other stakeholders joined the call despite invitation.

questions_asked.question: Can we integrate this with our existing student information system APIs?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for major SIS platforms and a flexible REST API for custom integrations.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 7 seats with standard automation setup, most customers are fully operational within 2-3 weeks.

questions_asked.question: Should we invite your finance lead or other decision-makers to the next conversation?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check internally first - I want to make sure we're aligned on the use case before bringing in others.

objections: Budget approval process might take some time - we're in Q4 planning mode right now
next_steps: Reese to socialize internally with her CS team
Rep to send trial access for hands-on testing
Schedule executive alignment call in two weeks

touches.ai_summary: Brief 4-minute call intended as executive alignment meeting, but only Reese joined. She mentioned her VP is supportive but traveling. Discussed initial pricing and Reese requested significant discount to fit budget constraints. Rep agreed to work on custom proposal.

questions_asked.question: What's your best pricing for 7 seats on the unlimited automation plan?
questions_asked.answer: Standard pricing would be around $7,600 annually, but let me see what we can do given your use case fit.

next_steps: Reese to confirm executive review timeline

touches.ai_summary: 32-minute negotiation call where Reese reviewed the $4,900 proposal (35% discount). She seemed pleased with the pricing adjustment and mentioned they're ready to move forward pending final finance review. Asked about contract flexibility and payment terms. Still only Reese on the call despite mention of VP approval being needed.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Our standard is annual, but I can check with finance about a payment plan option.

questions_asked.question: What's included in your onboarding support at this tier?
questions_asked.answer: You'll get a dedicated implementation specialist for the first 30 days plus ongoing email/chat support.

questions_asked.question: When would you ideally want to have this live for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally before end of quarter - we have a big cohort starting in January we want to use this for.

objections: Finance typically prefers quarterly payments for new vendor relationships
next_steps: Rep to confirm payment terms flexibility
Reese to route contract through finance for final approval
Target signature by end of week

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
